levelName: Level 69: While Loops - The Guessing Game
puzzleDescription: Create a loop that keeps asking for a guess until the user finds the secret number (7).
objective: The secret number is 7. Use a while loop to keep taking input. Print 'Correct!' only when the user guesses 7.
hints: Inside the loop, update the 'guess' variable with 'sc.nextInt();'.
The print statement 'Correct!' should be outside the loop so it only runs once the loop ends.
